summary: Full backend + frontend e2e test of AI Operator MVP. 19/19 backend pytest tests pass on public preview URL (health, plans, auth register/login/me, subscription auto-trial, bots CRUD + plan-limit enforcement + connect mock, products CRUD, activities). Full UI flow verified: landing /az and /tr, pricing CTAs with plan param, register lands directly on dashboard, login persists across reload (no pricing redirect), no 'subscription not found' anywhere, bot create + 2nd-bot-limit shows red top toast at z-9999 (NO native alert), product modal create/edit/delete works, Instagram connect shows 'next phase' toast, mobile 390x844 hamburger drawer opens with no horizontal scroll, AZ↔TR language switcher works.

issues: React Router v6 warnings about future flags v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath — non-blocking, can opt-in with future flags to silence.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend toPublic() correctly hides Mongo _id and uses UUID strings — verified no ObjectId leak.
ensureSubscription/getActiveSubscription correctly auto-create trial when TRIAL_MODE=true — both /auth/me and /subscription return non-null sub.
Bot limit enforcement returns 403 with structured 'bot_limit_reached' error and limit value — frontend toast renders the translated message correctly.
Toast container uses position:fixed top:0 z-index:9999 — meets z-[9999] requirement and stacks above modals.
POST /api/bots/:id/connect/:channel returns 202 + pending:true as documented (correctly mocked).
Frontend uses VITE_API_URL='' so calls go through ingress at /api — works under preview FastAPI proxy.
Minor: register endpoint validates phone min 4 chars — could be tightened to E.164 in future.
test_credentials: Each test registers a fresh TEST_qa.user+<uuid>@aioperator.local with Password123!. No seeded users required. Sample working creds documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: None required — all tests self-provision users via /api/auth/register.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL: https://ai-operator-audit.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend is Node.js+Express on internal :9000, exposed via FastAPI proxy on :8001. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. All endpoints prefixed with /api. UUID strings used as _id. Toast testid: 'toast-close'. Sidebar nav testids: nav-overview/nav-bots/nav-create-bot/nav-products/nav-activity/nav-subscription/nav-settings. Bot form submit: 'create-bot-submit'. Product form: 'product-submit', open via 'products-add-new'. Bot connect testids: 'connect-ig-<botId>' / 'connect-wa-<botId>'. Mobile menu: 'mobile-menu-toggle'. Lang switch: 'lang-switch-az' / 'lang-switch-tr'.
rca of the issue: No issues found — MVP is fully functional and matches the spec.
